ai_cards.title: Iran War Jolt
ai_cards.summary: Iranian strikes shut down petrochemical plants, leading to inflation and service company layoffs, potentially triggering a recession.

ai_cards.title: Market Muted
ai_cards.summary: Stocks remain stable as investors await Middle East peace talks, but geopolitical tensions keep sentiment on edge.

ai_cards.title: Service Sector Slowdown
ai_cards.summary: US service providers experience growth slowdown and rising inflation, impacting employment and consumer confidence.

ai_cards.title: Geopolitical Risks
ai_cards.summary: Rising oil prices and geopolitical tensions from Iran and Middle East conflicts increase risks for a potential recession and bear market.

social_buzz.title: Tech and Health Care Surge Amid Iran Conflict
social_buzz.summary: Micron and Netflix are leading gains due to AI memory demand and earnings upgrade, while health care stocks climb amid market volatility.
